claim_statement: A node persists only when Sigma_i is at or above Sigma_min.
method: Check algebraic consistency, unit consistency and limit behavior against linked derivation.
pass_condition: Equation is internally consistent, dimensionally valid and compatible with stated limit cases.
fail_condition: Any dimensional contradiction, algebraic inconsistency or failed limit-case reproduction.
commands: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\run_qng_p3_symbolic_validation.py --test-id QNG-T-001 --claim-id QNG-C-004 --mode formal_math --dataset-id DS-007 --derivation "03_math/derivations/qng-c-004.md" --formula-anchor "persist_i(t+1) = H(Sigma_i(t) - Sigma_min)" --seed 3001 --out-dir "05_validation/evidence/artifacts/qng-t-001"

decision.note: Symbolic formal-math checks pass consistency/unit/sign/limit gates on the linked derivation text.
